source.name: Swishy message and notification templates
source.license_notes: Use summarized motion patterns only; do not copy template output or assets.

layout_rules: Notifications should enter from a predictable edge and stack with clear z-order.
Use spring/bounce for friendly non-critical messages; use restrained motion for errors or security alerts.
Let notifications settle quickly and avoid covering primary controls for too long.
accessibility_notes: Announce important notifications through accessible live regions.
Do not auto-dismiss critical errors before they can be read.
Respect reduced motion by using fade instead of spring slide.
implementation_hints: Use translateY/translateX plus opacity for entry; add small scale overshoot for friendly motion.
Stagger stacked cards by 60-120ms and reduce scale/opacity for cards behind the top item.
Pair with Liquid Glass by making notification cards frosted, rounded, and rim-lit.

quality.notes: Swishy lists iOS notification, phone notification pop-up, message animation, and stacked notification templates.

retrieval.ai_summary: Use Swishy-style notification motion for toast/message stacks: slide-in, spring settle, staggered cards, quick dismissal, accessible announcement, and reduced-motion fade fallback.
